headline: 5 High-Yield Dividend Kings Down Over the Past Year Are 2026 Bargains
summary: Companies that have raised dividends for shareholders for 50 years or more are the kinds of investments passive income investors need to own. Dependability is crucial for individuals seeking to increase their annual income through dividend stock investments. The Dividend Kings are the 55 companies that have raised their dividends for at least 50 years, ... 5 High-Yield Dividend Kings Down Over the Past Year Are 2026 Bargains

headline: Has Genuine Parts (GPC) Fallen Too Far After Recent Share Price Slump?
summary: If you are wondering whether Genuine Parts at around US$99.09 is a bargain or a value trap, the recent share performance gives you a lot to think about. The stock has seen a 7.4% decline over the past week, a 21.2% decline over the past month, and a 20.1% decline year to date. This has contributed to a 15.2% decline over the last year and a 29.8% decline over three years. These moves have also left the five year return at a 2.7% decline, which may cause some investors to reassess how they...
